title: AI CEO Agent
description: Your strategic command centre. The AI CEO Agent provides high-level oversight of your entire solar installation business, monitoring KPIs, identifying growth opportunities, and flagging risks before they become problems. It synthesises data from every other agent into actionable strategic insights — like having a seasoned operations director who never sleeps.
features: Real-time business health monitoring with automated alerts
Growth opportunity identification based on market and pipeline data
Risk detection and proactive mitigation recommendations
Strategic goal tracking with weekly progress summaries
Cross-agent coordination and priority management
Competitive landscape analysis for the Irish solar market

title: Operations Agent
description: The backbone of your installation workflow. The Operations Agent tracks every job from initial enquiry through to completion, coordinating site visits, scheduling installation teams, and managing dependencies. It ensures nothing falls through the cracks and every job progresses smoothly through your pipeline.
features: End-to-end job tracking from enquiry to handover
Automated scheduling for site visits and installation dates
Installation team assignment and workload balancing
Dependency management between grants, permitting, and logistics
Real-time pipeline visibility with status updates
Automated customer notifications at every stage

title: Customer Support Agent
description: Your 24/7 front desk. The Customer Support Agent handles every incoming enquiry instantly — whether it arrives via your website, social media, email, or phone. It answers questions about pricing, SEAI grants, and installation timelines, qualifies leads, and books them directly into your calendar. Your customers never wait again.
features: Sub-60-second response to all customer enquiries
Multi-channel support: web, email, social media, and phone
Intelligent lead qualification with tailored questions
Automatic booking into your scheduling system
Consistent, accurate information about grants and pricing
Escalation handling for complex queries to your human team

title: Grants Agent
description: Your SEAI grant specialist. The Grants Agent manages the entire grant application lifecycle — from checking customer eligibility to preparing, submitting, and tracking SEAI applications. It stays up to date with the latest grant rates, criteria changes, and deadlines, ensuring every application has the highest chance of approval.
features: Automatic SEAI eligibility checks for every customer
Pre-filled grant applications with error validation
Real-time tracking of application status and deadlines
Automatic updates when grant rates or criteria change
Documentation management and compliance verification
Customer communication throughout the grant process

title: Logistics Agent
description: Your supply chain manager. The Logistics Agent handles equipment ordering, delivery scheduling, and inventory management across all your active jobs. It coordinates with your suppliers, tracks deliveries, and ensures the right materials arrive at the right job site at the right time — eliminating costly stockouts and delays.
features: Automated purchase order generation based on job requirements
Supplier coordination and delivery scheduling
Real-time inventory tracking across warehouses and job sites
Stockout prevention with proactive reorder alerts
Material cost tracking and budget management
Multi-supplier price comparison for best-value procurement

title: Permitting Agent
description: Your regulatory compliance expert. The Permitting Agent manages ESB grid connection applications, planning permission checks, building control notifications, and all other regulatory requirements. It pre-checks every application for completeness, tracks submission status, and chases responses — removing the biggest bottleneck in Irish solar installations.
features: ESB microgeneration application preparation and submission
Planning permission pre-checks and risk assessment
Building control compliance notifications
Document completeness validation before submission
Application status tracking with automated follow-ups
Knowledge base of current ESB and regulatory requirements

title: QA Agent
description: Your quality guardian. The QA Agent monitors installation quality across every job, managing snag lists, verifying compliance with NCET standards, and tracking installer certifications. It ensures that every installation meets the high standards your customers expect — and that your reputation stays spotless.
features: Automated snag list generation and resolution tracking
NCET compliance verification for every installation
Installer certification and training status monitoring
Post-installation customer satisfaction surveys
Quality trend analysis and improvement recommendations
Photo documentation and quality record management

title: Reporting Agent
description: Your business intelligence analyst. The Reporting Agent transforms raw operational data into clear, actionable insights. It generates real-time dashboards showing revenue, margins, pipeline health, installer productivity, and customer satisfaction — giving you the information you need to make confident decisions and drive growth.
features: Real-time revenue and margin tracking dashboards
Pipeline analysis with conversion rate insights
Installer and team productivity metrics
Customer acquisition cost and lifetime value analysis
Automated weekly and monthly business reports
Custom report generation for stakeholder presentations
